criteria.text: Context must be software engineering, specifically software construction.
Must present a usable solution (prototype or deployed).
Must be published after December 2021 and up to the search execution in 2025.
Must provide data addressing at least one sub-question (RQa-RQh).

_note: IC1-IC6 apply uniformly to both academic and grey sources. Grey sources additionally undergo a qualitative quality appraisal (see 5-grey-quality-appraisal.json), applied via the grey-screening prompt because grey literature lacks the peer-review filter of academic venues.
